privileged_info_summary: The Global Health Explorer task uses the Gapminder dataset from the Plotly datasets repository (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/plotly/datasets/master/gapminderDataFiveYear.csv), which is real public data. The dataset contains 1704 rows of country-level data across 142 unique countries spanning 1952-2007 in 5-year intervals, with columns: country, year, pop, continent, lifeExp, and gdpPercap. GDP per capita ranges from 241.17 to 113523.13, and life expectancy from 23.60 to 82.60 years. The task requires creating a Power BI report with three visuals (Filled Map, Scatter Chart, Table), a page named 'Global Health', and two model items: a calculated column 'Income_Group' using GDP thresholds and a measure 'Avg_Life_Expectancy'. The data is non-synthetic and sourced from the public Gapminder project via Plotly.
